person_name: Mummius, Roman general (conqueror of Corinth, fl. 2nd century BCE)
person_name_full: Mummius, Roman general (conqueror of Corinth, fl. 2nd century BCE)
notes: Roman general known for conquering Corinth in the 2nd century BCE.

docs.title: Life of Philopoemen
docs.author: Plutarch
docs.excerpt: … justly distinguished, and as became honest men, betwixt usefulness and virtue, — what is good in itself, and what is profitable to particular parties, — judging thanks and reward due to him who does a benefit, from him who receives it, and honor never to be denied by the good to the good.
